description: Cover client preparation, adoption, lifecycle, request options, origin policy, failures, and timeout; settle missing-marker failures

asi.learning: Client missing-marker errors escaped before the request try/catch, causing an unhandled rejection and permanently pending public promises; moving marker setup inside the error boundary fixed the lifecycle contract.
asi.remaining: React branches and server abort/failure/parser paths

description: Cover React provider, hook, boundary, and MicroFrame rendering/attachment contracts

asi.learning: Public component behavior can cover all context, fallback, optional-prop, host-state, and effect branches through jsdom rendering without exposing internals.
asi.remaining: Server branch paths dominate remaining gap.

description: Cover server registration, abort, request configuration, fetch failures, timeout, malformed composition, unsafe parser completion, and pipeline failures

asi.learning: A small set of contract tests covered server lifecycle and composition failures; final unsafe parallel parser contexts reject rather than risking invalid payload placement.
asi.remaining: Three additional branches needed for the 90% target.

description: Cover equivalent headerless client requests and public error metadata/message variants

asi.learning: Public error formatting and default request normalization supplied the final meaningful branches; all four dimensions now exceed 90%.

description: Enforce 90% thresholds for statements, branches, functions, and lines

asi.learning: Thresholds make the achieved target durable in local and CI coverage runs; equal metric accepted because this adds regression backpressure without production complexity.
asi.checks: typecheck, formatting, coverage, and build pass
